option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Publish crate
on: push: tags: - 'v*.*.*' workflow_dispatch:
permissions: contents: read
concurrency: group: publish-${{ github.ref }} cancel-in-progress: false
jobs: publish: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Check out repository uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Install Rust toolchain uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
- name: Cache Cargo registry and build artifacts uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
- name: Run test suite run: cargo test --locked
- name: Verify publish package run: cargo publish --locked --dry-run env: CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CARGO_API_KEY }}
- name: Publish to crates.io run: cargo publish --locked env: CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CARGO_API_KEY }}

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
[package] name = "ring-db" version = "0.1.0" edition = "2024"
[lib] name = "ringdb" path = "src/lib.rs"
[[example]] name = "cli" path = "examples/cli.rs"
[[bench]] name = "query_backends" path = "benches/query_backends.rs" harness = false
[dependencies] rayon = "1.11.0" thiserror = "2" memmap2 = "0.9" bincode = "1" serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
[dev-dependencies] criterion = { version = "0.5", features = ["html_reports"] } rand = { version = "0.8", features = ["small_rng"] } clap = { version = "4", features = ["derive"] }
[build] rustflags = ["-C", "target-cpu=native"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
[package] name = "ring-db" version = "0.1.0" edition = "2024" description = "A Rust library for ring queries in high-dimensional vector spaces." license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0" readme = "README.md" repository = "https://github.com/mathias-vandaele/ring-db" documentation = "https://docs.rs/ring-db"
[lib] name = "ringdb" path = "src/lib.rs"
[[example]] name = "cli" path = "examples/cli.rs"
[[bench]] name = "query_backends" path = "benches/query_backends.rs" harness = false
[dependencies] rayon = "1.11.0" thiserror = "2" memmap2 = "0.9" bincode = "1" serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
[dev-dependencies] criterion = { version = "0.5", features = ["html_reports"] } rand = { version = "0.8", features = ["small_rng"] } clap = { version = "4", features = ["derive"] }
[build] rustflags = ["-C", "target-cpu=native"]

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
